printed.name: Lunge Forward
printed.setup: Standing on carriage, one foot on footbar, knee over ankle, other leg straight, heel against shoulder rest, arms straight, shoulder width apart, hands placed on footbar

movement.inhale: Stretch hip flexors of back leg (3-5 breaths)
movement.exhale: Straighten back leg, lower trunk forward (3- 5 breaths)

cues: Bias toward posterior tilt of pelvis during hip flexor stretch
Bias toward anterior tilt of pelvis during hamstring stretch
Move pelvis along horizontal line when straightening and bending front leg
Maintain spinal extensor engagement during hamstring stretch
